description: iOS solve/wrong-answer/payment flows aligned with the real backend API contract.

steps.name: solve-api-contract
steps.description: Align iOS Solve submit/result models with /api/solves.
steps.summary: SubmitRequest.Answer now sends selectedOption/answerText instead of chosenAnswer. SolveAnswer response decoding now uses questionId/selectedOption/correctOption/correct, and backend preserves nullable non-MCQ options.

steps.name: answer-type-ui
steps.description: Branch solve and wrong-answer retry UI by question type.
steps.summary: MCQ answers use 1-4 selectedOption controls. Short-answer/descriptive answers use text input and submit answerText. Wrong-answer list/preview now include questionType.

steps.name: storekit-env-validation
steps.description: Harden StoreKit verification order and iOS environment defaults.
steps.summary: Purchases, restores, and Transaction.updates finish transactions only after PaymentService.verifyApple succeeds. APIEnvironment follows Debug localhost and Release www.sqldpass.com defaults. AuthStore print logging was removed.
